name: Carrot, Leek and Olive Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Leeks, scrubbed and chopped into half-inch pieces
2 cups Raw carrots, scrubed and finely diced
1 cup Raw red potatoe, finely diced
1/2 cup Ripe plums, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté leeks and garlic in oil in a 4-quart stew pot.
2. When leeks are soft, add all other vegetables and seasonings.
3. Add broth, cover, and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer at least 45 minutes.
5. During the last 5 minutes of cooking, stir in olives.
(Note: Thicken with 1 tablespoon whole wheat or rice flour if desired)
Total Calories per serving: 235
Fat: 10 grams
